title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at 99acres

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at 99acres
jsonLd.description:
99acres has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!
